creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
Just FYI: As of /usr/ports -r414369 I still get the problem that indirectly blocks building graphics/dri and the like:

/usr/bin/ld: tools/lld/lib/ReaderWriter/ELF/CMakeFiles/lldELF.dir/DynamicFile.cpp.o: relocation R_X86_64_PC32 against `_ZN3lld3elf14ELFDynamicAtomIN4llvm6object7ELFTypeILNS2_7support10endiannessE1ELb0EEEEC2ERKNS0_11DynamicFileIS7_EENS2_9StringRefESD_PKNS3_12Elf_Sym_ImplIS7_EE' can not be used when making a shared object; recompile with -fPIC

** Fix the problem and try again.
